prestazioni: BMW B57D30 (3.0L inline-6 diesel) Stage 2+ ECU remap by Dimsport Genius with custom EGR/DPF/AdBlue delete (Euro 6d-TEMP compliant bypass) and 380hp/800Nm output, paired with a Garrett GTD2056VK turbocharger (hybrid billet compressor wheel, 64mm inducer, 76mm exducer) and upgraded BorgWarner turbo actuator (P/N 53039880021)

Full 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Akrapović (P/N BE-1925-0400) with dual 100mm carbon-fiber tips, bypassing the factory DPF/SCR for reduced backpressure, and paired with a custom 200-cell catalytic converter by HJS (P/N 80000.200) for emissions compliance

Drivetrain reinforcement with a ZF 8HP76 Xtend clutch kit (P/N 83222357798) featuring a sintered metallic friction disc, uprated dual-mass flywheel (Sachs P/N 3000951001), and a limited-slip differential by Drexler Motorsport (P/N 330D-G20-3.36) with 3.36:1 final drive ratio and 60% lockup under load
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (P/N RB-BMW-G20-330D) with carbon-fiber fenders (25mm extended front, 35mm rear), custom front splitter with integrated canards (P/N RB-SPL-G20-01), and a ducktail spoiler (P/N RB-SPO-G20-02) for -20mm ride height adjustment compatibility

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (P/N DFV G20 330D) with 24-way adjustable damping, 20mm front/15mm rear camber plates, and custom spring rates (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear) for aggressive track alignment (-3.5° front camber, -2.8° rear)

BBS FI-R 9.5x19 ET35 (front) and 10.5x19 ET40 (rear) forged wheels in matte graphite (P/N 095F950063F/095F950064R) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35 R19 front, 295/30 R19 rear) with custom TPMS sensors (Schrader P/N 28100)
